channel.title: Frontion News - Geopolitical Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🏴‍☠️🚢 Pirates hijack oil tanker off Somalia coast as piracy returns to Indian Ocean
item.description: An oil tanker was hijacked off the coast of Somalia, marking a resurgence of piracy in a region once notorious for attacks. Piracy had declined after international naval patrols but has made a comeback in recent years.

item.title: 🇽🇰⚖️ Three Kosovo Serbs sentenced to life imprisonment for 2023 monastery siege
item.description: Kosovo court sentenced two men to life imprisonment and another to 30 years for the deadly gun battle and monastery siege in 2023, one of the worst incidents since Kosovo declared independence.

item.title: 🇹🇼🇨🇳 Taiwan president accuses China of forcing cancellation of Eswatini diplomatic trip
item.description: Taiwan President accused Beijing of pressuring Eswatini to cancel a planned diplomatic visit, highlighting continued Chinese efforts to isolate Taiwan internationally.

item.title: 🇵🇭⚖️ Philippines ex-president Rodrigo Duterte to face trial for crimes against humanity
item.description: Former Philippine President Duterte will face trial for crimes against humanity related to his deadly war on drugs campaign, which killed thousands during his tenure.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Netanyahu Diagnosed With Prostate Cancer, Kept Public in Dark
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu was diagnosed with prostate cancer without informing the Israeli public, Haaretz reports. The diagnosis comes as Israel continues to navigate the Iran war and hostage negotiations.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israeli Child Dies of Wounds From Iranian Cluster Missile Attack
item.description: An 11-year-old Israeli girl has died from wounds sustained in an Iranian cluster missile strike last month, highlighting the ongoing civilian toll of the Iran-Israel conflict.

item.title: 🚢 Navy Rushing Hellfire Missiles to Carrier Strike Groups for Drone Defense
item.description: The U.S. Navy is accelerating deployment of Hellfire missiles to carrier strike groups as counter-drone capabilities amid growing threats from one-way attack drones in the Middle East theater.

item.title: ⚔️ Trump Orders Kill Order on Iranian Small Boats, Tripling Demining Efforts
item.description: President Trump has issued a kill order for Iranian small boats and announced plans to triple demining operations in the Strait of Hormuz, though the status of current demining activities remains unclear.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Mandelson Under Investigation by EUs Anti-Fraud Office
item.description: The EUs anti-fraud office OLAF has launched a formal investigation into UK ambassador to the US Peter Mandelson.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Justice Department Drops Probe into Fed Chair Powell
item.description: The DOJ dropped its investigation into Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell after Trump accused him of cost overruns in Fed building renovations.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Irans Foreign Minister to Visit Pakistan as US Talks Remain Stalled
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi will travel to Pakistan, Oman and Russia to explore whether peace talks with the US can be reopened.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Leaders Look to Mutual Assistance Pact Amid NATO Jitters
item.description: European Union nations are examining a little-known mutual defense obligation as questions arise about US commitment to NATO under Trump.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Kushner and Witkoff Said to Be Headed to Pakistan for Iran Negotiations
item.description: President Trump is sending Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff to Pakistan for potential peace talks with Iran, with VP Vance on standby.

item.title: 🇪🇺 NATO Has No Provision to Expel Members After US Threatens Spain
item.description: NATO stated there is no provision in its treaty to expel members after a leaked Pentagon email suggested the US was considering suspending Spain from the alliance over lack of support for the Iran war.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Rejects Falklands Review Report After Leaked Pentagon Memo
item.description: Downing Street stated that Falklands sovereignty rests with the UK after a reported Pentagon document raised the prospect of changing the UKs position in retaliation for not joining the Iran war.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Soldier Charged for Betting $400K on Maduro Raid Using Classified Intel
item.description: A US special forces soldier involved in the operation that captured Venezuelas Nicolas Maduro has been charged with insider trading after allegedly using classified information to bet on the outcome before it was public.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Netanyahu Treated for Early-Stage Prostate Cancer
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu revealed he underwent radiation therapy for early-stage prostate cancer after a malignant tumor was detected during follow-up care.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Third US aircraft carrier arrives in Middle East as Iran war continues
item.description: The USS George H.W. Bush has joined two other carriers in the region as President Trump demands progress in peace negotiations with Tehran.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Netanyahu reveals he underwent prostate cancer treatment during Iran war
item.description: The Israeli prime minister said he kept the diagnosis secret due to the ongoing conflict with Iran. He is now in excellent physical condition after radiation therapy.

item.title: 🇸🇾 Syrian authorities arrest main suspect in notorious 2013 Tadamon massacre
item.description: Ex-intelligence officer Amjad Youssef was arrested for the mass killing of blindfolded civilians during the Syrian civil war. He was identified in a leaked video.

item.title: 🇧🇬 Bulgaria elects pro-Russia president, EU partners watch nervously
item.description: Rumen Radev won elections this week with a record of pro-Russia statements. Now Bulgarians and EU partners wait to see which way he will turn.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Three US aircraft carriers operate in Middle East for first time since 2003
item.description: The USS Carl Vinson, USS Truman, and a third carrier are now in CENTCOM area, marking the largest US naval presence in the region since the Iraq War.

item.title: 🇩🇪 ArianeGroup studying ballistic missile production in Germany
item.description: European defense contractor explores deep-strike missile capabilities in Germany as European nations seek conventional ballistic missiles amid expanding conflicts.

item.title: 🇪🇺 NATO eyes Swedish-Canadian GlobalEye jet for AWACS role
item.description: NATO considers Saab GlobalEye as replacement for aging Boeing E-3 Sentry fleet, signaling shift away from US manufacturer for key surveillance capability.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia cuts key interest rate to 14.5% amid wartime inflation easing
item.description: Russian Central Bank slashes rate for eighth consecutive time from record highs as wartime spending pressures begin to ease.
